name: Customized Cash Rewards Credit Card
perks: 3% cash back in your choice category: gas, online shopping, dining, travel, drug stores, or home improvement
2% cash back at grocery stores and wholesale clubs
$200 bonus after spending $1,000 in first 90 days
0% intro APR on purchases and balance transfers for 15 months
Preferred Rewards members can earn up to 5.25% in choice category
drawbacks: 3% category capped at $2,500 per quarter combined with 2% category
Must manually select your 3% category each month or it defaults to gas
Preferred Rewards bonus requires substantial Bank of America banking relationship
